welcome.text: Hi! I'm Gonka Bot, an AI assistant powered by Kimi K2.6 on the Gonka decentralized network. Just send me a message to start chatting.
tos.intro: Before we chat, please review and accept the Terms of Service. Gonka Bot is free and works without signup. By using it you agree to our basic rules + privacy policy.
tos.full:
Terms of Service v{version}

1. The bot is a free AI assistant — no warranty, use at your own risk.
2. You must be 18+ to use this bot.
3. We don't sell or share your messages with third parties. OpenAI processes voice transcription and moderation; mingles.ai relays your messages to Kimi K2.6 on the Gonka network.
4. Your chat history is stored to keep multi-turn conversations working. Run /delete_my_data anytime to erase it.
5. Harmful, illegal, or sexually-exploitative content is forbidden and may result in a permanent ban.
6. We may update these terms; on a version bump you'll be asked to re-accept.

Questions? Use /about for contact info.
tos.updated_notice: Our Terms have been updated. Please review and accept the new version.
age.question: Are you 18 or older?
age.under18: Sorry, this bot is only for users 18 and over.
age.blocked: Access is blocked for another {daysLeft} day(s).
admin.kill_on: 🚨 Kill switch ON — bot now refusing non-admin updates.
admin.kill_off: ✅ Kill switch OFF — bot accepting updates again.
help.text:
Available commands:
/start — restart the bot
/help — show this message
/new — clear the current conversation and start fresh
/persona — switch persona
/voice — toggle voice replies
/lang — change interface language
/about — about the bot
about.text: Gonka Bot v{version}. Powered by Kimi K2.6 on the Gonka decentralized network. Free, no signup. Learn more: gonka.ai
rate_limit.text: Daily limit reached ({current}/{limit}). Try again in ~{hours}h.
rate_limit.voice: Voice limit reached. Try again in ~{hours}h.
rate_limit.document: Document limit reached. Try again in ~{hours}h.
error.message_too_long: Your message is too long (max {limit} characters).
error.service_unavailable: Service is overloaded right now. Please try again in a minute.
error.internal: Something went wrong on my side. Try again or run /new.
error.maintenance: Service temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
error.voice_failed: Couldn't transcribe that voice message. Try again, or send text.
new_conversation.confirmed: Started a new conversation. Previous context cleared.
document.replaced_context: Got it — {pages} pages, ~{tokens} tokens. Started a new conversation; previous context cleared. Ask me about it.
document.too_long: Document is too long ({tokens} tokens; max {limit}).
document.unsupported: Unsupported format. I can read PDF, DOCX, TXT, or Markdown.
document.parse_failed: Couldn't read this document. Scanned PDFs without a text layer aren't supported.
moderation.input_blocked: I can't help with that. Please ask something else.
moderation.output_blocked: I can't share that response. Try a different question.
moderation.document_blocked: This document contains content I can't process.
moderation.self_harm_resources: If you're struggling, please reach out to a professional. International hotlines: https://findahelpline.com
report.thanks: Thanks for reporting. We'll review it.
report.nothing_to_report: Nothing to report — reply to one of my messages with /report, or send /report after a chat reply.
delete.confirm: This will permanently delete ALL your data (conversations, messages, usage stats). Continue?
delete.done: Done. All your data has been deleted.
voice.enabled: Voice replies enabled. I'll send you both text and audio.
voice.disabled: Voice replies disabled. I'll send text only.
persona.selected: Now I'm {name}. Starting a fresh conversation.
persona.default.name: Assistant
persona.analyst.name: Analyst
persona.coder.name: Coder
persona.therapist.name: Listener
persona.translator.name: Translator
persona.editor.name: Editor
persona.researcher.name: Researcher
persona.teacher.name: Teacher
persona.chef.name: Chef
persona.writer.name: Writer
group.must_start_dm_first: Please DM me first and accept the terms: {botLink}
